
## Linked Issue
- Closes \#\<issue-id> 
- https://github.com/IOTypes/REPO/issues/TICKET-NO

# What/Why
What changes has been implemented.

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked the ticket using "Closes #123" (or "Fixes #123")
- [ ] The ticket has clear acceptance criteria and is up to date
- [ ] Lint/format passes locally and in CI
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] DB migrations included (if needed) and backwards-compatible (if possible)
- [ ] Docs/README updated (if needed)
